story.iWant: to describe my workflow needs in natural language and have AI generate the workflow structure
story.soThat: I can quickly create workflows without manually editing YAML or understanding workflow syntax.

tasks.task: Task 1: AI Workflow Creation Dialog UI (AC: 2.1, 2.3)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: **AC-2.1**: User can describe workflow in natural language and receive AI-suggested structure
**AC-2.2**: AI detects workflow tier (Basic vs Intermediate) based on requirements
**AC-2.3**: Iterative refinement works (user can modify suggested steps before finalizing)
**AC-2.4**: Generated workflow saved to "My Workflows/custom/" with all required files
**AC-2.5**: Workflow appears in workflow list and is executable

constraints.constraint: IPC communication patterns between main and renderer processes

ideas.idea: Test: **AC-2.1**: User can describe workflow in natural language and receive AI-sugges...
Test: **AC-2.2**: AI detects workflow tier (Basic vs Intermediate) based on requiremen...
Test: **AC-2.3**: Iterative refinement works (user can modify suggested steps before f...
Test: **AC-2.4**: Generated workflow saved to "My Workflows/custom/" with all required...
Test: **AC-2.5**: Workflow appears in workflow list and is executable...
